name: python3-mypy-boto3-ebs
title: python3-mypy-boto3-ebs
description:
Type annotations for EBS (Python 3)
This package contains type annotations for EBS service compatible with VSCode,
PyCharm, Emacs, Sublime Text, mypy, pyright and other tools.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-mypy-boto3-ebs because Type annotations for EBS (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-mypy-boto3-ebs as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-mypy-boto3-ebs with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-mypy-boto3-ebs --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
